productDisplayName: Reebok Men Premier ultra 8 U-form Silver Sports Shoes
description: The reebok Premier Ultra 8 U-Form is a running shoe with a difference. Like other running shoes it is light-weight and well ventilated but what's special about these shoes is the U-Form footwear lining technology that takes the shape of your foot when heated! Heat shoes in an oven at 200 degree F for 3 minutes, put on the shoes, lace them up tightly, sit in them for 8 minutes, and voila your shoe has taken the shape of your foot! For detailed instructions you can check out  www.reebok.com/uformAmong other spectacular features are the KineticFit sure-Fit panels that accomodate the shift in size and shape of your foot through the foot strike. Added to this is the plush DMX Ride cushioning that makes it an all the more comfortable, smooth and flexible ride. Wear them when you want to run or jog or use them as casual wear if you wish.UpperBreathable mesh upper for ample ventilation and reduced irritationSynthetic overlays for added shoe structure, durability and styleU-Form footwear lining technology that takes the shape of the foot when heatedKineticFit sure-fit panels to accomodate the shift in size and shape of the foot through the entire foot strikeSmoothFit upper for increased comfort and reduction of seam related irritation and rubLace-up system with synthetic laces for a snug, customized fitLushly padded mesh tongue for better ventilation and comfortStableFit memory foam collar lining  for in-step comfortBrand name on tongue, medial side of shoe and behind collarBrand logo on lateral sideMidsoleInjection Moulded EVA midsole for lightweight responsive cushioning and shock absorptionDMX Ride foam cushioning for all-day comfortPlayDry lining for moisture managementOutsoleDMPRTek rubber outsole for lightweight cushioning and durabilityDMX Shear vertical panels for greater comfortDMX Shear vertical and horizontal heel cushioning to minimize stress on impactTransition Bridge for ultimate heel-to-toe responseWaffle-pattern grip for excellent tractionScooped heel for extra cushioning and comfortFlex grooves for ease of movementShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
